prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程 及其自动化、计算机科学与技术、通信工程等招生专业对应大类社会热度持续偏高（高热推荐/推荐），对考生吸引力较强；新疆2026年普通高考考生总数约23.8万人（数据标注 不确定），较2025年文理科合计约7.65万人大幅增长，竞争环境显著加剧，较2024年390分上升，反映整体竞争强度提升；河 北工业大学主校区位于天津市，在新疆招生占比约0.03%（据招生计划推算），属跨省招生；学校地处东部沿海直辖市，对新疆考生具有一定地域吸引力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 5831 → 5926 → 5485, showing a fluctuating trend over the past three years. In 2025, it moved forward by about 441 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 5485. The university's enrollment plan for science in Xinjiang was 24 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 25 in 2026, remaining unchanged for two consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In 2026, it ranked 107th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 103–109 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The university's reputation evaluation in 2026 showed no significant positive or negative signals, with stable public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, not forming a significant increase in application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines, with its advantageous disciplines mainly at B+ level (such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.), and its overall disciplinary precision is at a medium level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology, and Communication Engineering correspond to categories with persistently high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended), strongly attracting applicants. The total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 is approximately 238,000 (data marked as uncertain), a significant increase from the combined total of about 76,500 for arts and sciences in 2025, sharply intensifying the competitive environment. Compared to 2024, the score threshold has risen, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity. The main campus of Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, with its enrollment proportion in Xinjiang approximately 0.03% (estimated based on enrollment plan), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The university is situated in an eastern coastal municipality, offering a certain regional appeal to Xinjiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5485, the continuous flat enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of Xinjiang candidates (expected to exceed 200%) leading to intensified competition, and the sustained attraction of high-scoring candidates by popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for science in 2026 will slightly shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5515, with a range of 5015–6015.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5015–6015, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<5015), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>6015), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 2242 → 1723 → 1638, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 604 positions over the past 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1638. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Xinjiang was 13 students from 2023 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is also 13 students, remaining unchanged for four consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 107th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities, still strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates. Its reputation evaluation is neutral, with no major public opinion incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 93rd with a rating of 'average', not forming a surge in application interest. The university has no A- or above disciplines; liberal arts-related disciplines (e.g., Marxist Theory) are rated at B level, indicating overall liberal arts strength is at a medium level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law, International Chinese Language Education, and Ideological and Political Education correspond to socially popular categories (recommended), with Law having clear advantages for civil service exams. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Xinjiang increased significantly, with liberal arts candidates estimated at approximately 75,000 based on historical proportions, a growth of about 213% compared to 25,000 in 2025, leading to intensified competition. Compared to the 2024 score of 425, this reflects an overall increase in competition intensity. The university is located in Tianjin, offering regional appeal for cross-province study to Xinjiang liberal arts candidates, but with only 13 enrollment slots, competition concentration is high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1638, the unchanged enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of liberal arts candidates in Xinjiang (estimated over 200%) leading to intensified competition, and the continued attraction of high-scoring candidates to popular majors like Law, the minimum admission ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is expected to slightly decline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1658, with a range of 1243 to 2073.
